query: Sono un consulente sicurezza sul lavoro: trovami PMI italiane con cantieri, produzione, appalti o crescita del personale operativo
semantic_errors: production_expansion source lane was selected but never queried
the first two source lanes filled the global URL cap before mandatory lane coverage completed
48 pages were scheduled before minimum breadth-first lane coverage
one Anthropic extraction on a known enterprise careers page consumed EUR 0.026511
root_cause: URL discovery treated the global URL cap as a loop termination condition instead of reserving and measuring one execution slot per required signal lane. The legacy structured hiring pass duplicated the canonical job_market lane, and official-domain evidence was sent to the LLM before deterministic identity extraction and enterprise rejection.
offline_remediation: measure executed required signals instead of comparing aggregate query counts
execute every required source query before honoring the global URL cap
reserve URL capacity for still-missing required signals
limit first-round breadth to one page per query
disable duplicate legacy structured hiring when canonical job_market is present
extract explicit signals on official domains deterministically before paid LLM use
reject known non-SME official domains before paid extraction
cap extraction output to three companies and 700 output tokens
remove non-essential canonical-plan fields from paid extraction prompts
